items.name: Candidate dumps a LOBBYCONNECT PPM via screen-switch
items.spec: Extend SILENCER_DUMP_SCREEN to handle 'lobby_connect' and write a 640x480 P6 PPM at /tmp/sdl3_dump/screen_00.ppm. main_menu / options / options_audio / options_display / options_controls pathways must remain unchanged. Sub-palette 2 active.

items.name: Sub-palette 2 (lobby) resolves correctly
items.spec: The candidate switches to sub-palette 2 for this screen and resolves its framebuffer through it. Color tones in the dump match the reference (the panel chrome should be green-on-black with the same shade as the reference, not the menu's slightly-different green).

items.name: Bank 7 idx 2 panel sprite renders correctly
items.spec: The bank-7 idx-2 panel sprite (different from CONTROLS' idx 7) renders at (0,0) covering the form area. Outer border, inner textbox border + scrollbar lane, horizontal divider, input-field wells, and button-row well all visible and structurally matching the reference.

items.name: Form composition (textbox + 2 input rows + 2 buttons)
items.spec: Per docs/design/screen-lobby-connect.md object inventory: textbox at (185,101) 250x170; Username/Password labels at (190, 291/318); two TextInput fields at (275, 293/320) 180x14; Login B52x21 at (264,339); Cancel B52x21 at (321,339). All present and visible. Cursor blink and textbox content are non-structural and don't gate this item.

items.name: Visual equivalence to /tmp/real_lobbyconnect_dump.ppm
items.spec: Final gate. Candidate PPM is visually equivalent to /tmp/real_lobbyconnect_dump.ppm to a casual reader, modulo non-structural variations (cursor-blink phase in Username input, exact textbox text content). <1% pixel difference acceptable for structural pixels (chrome, labels, button outlines, label glyphs).
